svg.title: AWS Security Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: Three security data sources feeding into pipelines: CloudTrail to CSV alerts, GuardDuty through EventBridge and Lambda to email, Prowler to HTML dashboard, and all three sources aggregating through Security Hub to a Daily Digest Lambda and email.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does CloudTrail log collection work with S3?')
sendPrompt('What data is stored in alerts.csv?')
sendPrompt('How does EventBridge route GuardDuty findings?')
sendPrompt('What does the Lambda function do with GuardDuty findings?')
sendPrompt('How does SNS deliver security alerts?')
sendPrompt('What does the GuardDuty alert email contain?')
sendPrompt('What is Prowler and what does it scan?')
sendPrompt('What does the Prowler HTML dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does AWS Security Hub aggregate findings?')
sendPrompt('What does the Daily Digest Lambda compile?')
sendPrompt('What does the daily security digest email contain?')

svg.text: Click any node to learn more about that component
